title: Glochri86's Vanilla OPTIMIZED
description: Modpack to optimize minecraft and add a ton of QoL mods made to make the switch from bedrock to java thrilling.
body:
![Glochri86 vanilla optimized banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/494c91d72dc23ddac512d5c5fc9082da6556ebd3_0.webp)
# Description
A modpack made to optimize minecraft, make it closer to bedrock and make the experience less stressful while remaining basically vanilla.
## Optimized
it runs on all kind of pcs: tested on GTX 750TI , GTX1050TI , RTX 3050, RTX 4050, and some integrated graphics (at 720p) like intel HD 4600 and UHD 630 and all get more than 100 fps. It includes Shaders such as Bliss, rethinking voxels, bsl, make up ultrafast and other donwloadable via in game menus.
## Stable
This modpack is made by a really slow pc. it aims to load chunks as fast as possible while trying to stutter less.
## QOL Mods
This modpack as i said aims to make the minecraft experience closer to bedrock. It includes mods like "Bridging mod" to make bridges faster, "Smart Block Placement" to make the placement of blocks A LOT faster, "Hold My Items" to make it similar to a mod of Minecraft Bedrock and "Switcheroo" to make mining sessions faster and easier with automatic switching of tools.
## Controller Support
Thanks to "Controlify" this modpack also has Controller support for Xbox , PS , and other controllers.
## Resource packs
This modpack adds some resourcepacks you can choose from, but you can download others from in game menus thanks to "Resourcify"
## Play with your friends!
This modpack adds "E4MC" a mod made to easily host servers to your friends around the world by sharing a link. you can actiate the server hoster by simply opening the world to LAN and then checking the chat.
### Updates to this modpack
I will try to update this modpack only in the "mainstream" versions of minecraft or really when i have time.
